XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Wordly End-User License Agreement (EULA)
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Wordly End-User License Agreement (EULA)
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Wordly End-User License Agreement (EULA)

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Last updated: June 25, 2019
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Last updated: June 25, 2019
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Last updated: June 25, 2019

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Please read this End-User License Agreement ("Agreement") carefully before clicking the "I Agree" button, downloading or using Wordly ("Application").
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Please read this End-User License Agreement ("Agreement") carefully before clicking the "I Agree" button, downloading or using Wordly ("Application").
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Please read this End-User License Agreement ("Agreement") carefully before clicking the "I Agree" button, downloading or using Wordly ("Application").

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: By clicking the "I Agree" button, downloading or using the Application, you are agreeing to be bound by the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: By clicking the "I Agree" button, downloading or using the Application, you are agreeing to be bound by the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: By clicking the "I Agree" button, downloading or using the Application, you are agreeing to be bound by the terms and conditions of this Agreement.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: This Agreement is a legal agreement between you (either an individual or a single entity) and Wordly, Inc (Wordly) and it governs your use of the Application made available to you by Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: This Agreement is a legal agreement between you (either an individual or a single entity) and Wordly, Inc (Wordly) and it governs your use of the Application made available to you by Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: This Agreement is a legal agreement between you (either an individual or a single entity) and Wordly, Inc (Wordly) and it governs your use of the Application made available to you by Wordly.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: If you do not agree to the terms of this Agreement, do not click on the "I Agree" button and do not download or use the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: If you do not agree to the terms of this Agreement, do not click on the "I Agree" button and do not download or use the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: If you do not agree to the terms of this Agreement, do not click on the "I Agree" button and do not download or use the Application.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: The Application is licensed, not sold, to you by Wordly for use strictly in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: The Application is licensed, not sold, to you by Wordly for use strictly in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: The Application is licensed, not sold, to you by Wordly for use strictly in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 1. License
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 1. License
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 1. License

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Wordly grants you a revocable, non-exclusive, non-transferable, limited license to download, install and use the Application solely for your personal, non-commercial purposes strictly in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Wordly grants you a revocable, non-exclusive, non-transferable, limited license to download, install and use the Application solely for your personal, non-commercial purposes strictly in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Wordly grants you a revocable, non-exclusive, non-transferable, limited license to download, install and use the Application solely for your personal, non-commercial purposes strictly in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 2. Restrictions
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 2. Restrictions
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 2. Restrictions

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: You agree not to, and you will not permit others to:
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: You agree not to, and you will not permit others to:
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: You agree not to, and you will not permit others to:

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: a) License, sell, rent, lease, assign, distribute, transmit, host, outsource, disclose or otherwise commercially exploit the Application or make the Application available to any third party.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: a) License, sell, rent, lease, assign, distribute, transmit, host, outsource, disclose or otherwise commercially exploit the Application or make the Application available to any third party.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: a) License, sell, rent, lease, assign, distribute, transmit, host, outsource, disclose or otherwise commercially exploit the Application or make the Application available to any third party.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: b) Copy or use the Application for any purpose other than as permitted under the above section 'License'.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: b) Copy or use the Application for any purpose other than as permitted under the above section 'License'.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: b) Copy or use the Application for any purpose other than as permitted under the above section 'License'.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: c) Modify, make derivative works of, disassemble, decrypt, reverse compile or reverse engineer any part of the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: c) Modify, make derivative works of, disassemble, decrypt, reverse compile or reverse engineer any part of the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: c) Modify, make derivative works of, disassemble, decrypt, reverse compile or reverse engineer any part of the Application.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: d) Remove, alter or obscure any proprietary notice (including any notice of copyright or trademark) of Wordly or its affiliates, partners, suppliers or the licensors of the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: d) Remove, alter or obscure any proprietary notice (including any notice of copyright or trademark) of Wordly or its affiliates, partners, suppliers or the licensors of the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: d) Remove, alter or obscure any proprietary notice (including any notice of copyright or trademark) of Wordly or its affiliates, partners, suppliers or the licensors of the Application.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 3. Intellectual Property
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 3. Intellectual Property
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 3. Intellectual Property

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: The Application, including without limitation all copyrights, patents, trademarks, trade secrets and other intellectual property rights are, and shall remain, the sole and exclusive property of Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: The Application, including without limitation all copyrights, patents, trademarks, trade secrets and other intellectual property rights are, and shall remain, the sole and exclusive property of Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: The Application, including without limitation all copyrights, patents, trademarks, trade secrets and other intellectual property rights are, and shall remain, the sole and exclusive property of Wordly.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 4. Your Suggestions
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 4. Your Suggestions
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 4. Your Suggestions

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Any feedback, comments, ideas, improvements or suggestions (collectively, "Suggestions") provided by you to Wordly with respect to the Application shall remain the sole and exclusive property of Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Any feedback, comments, ideas, improvements or suggestions (collectively, "Suggestions") provided by you to Wordly with respect to the Application shall remain the sole and exclusive property of Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Any feedback, comments, ideas, improvements or suggestions (collectively, "Suggestions") provided by you to Wordly with respect to the Application shall remain the sole and exclusive property of Wordly.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Wordly shall be free to use, copy, modify, publish, or redistribute the Suggestions for any purpose and in any way without any credit or any compensation to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Wordly shall be free to use, copy, modify, publish, or redistribute the Suggestions for any purpose and in any way without any credit or any compensation to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Wordly shall be free to use, copy, modify, publish, or redistribute the Suggestions for any purpose and in any way without any credit or any compensation to you.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 5. Modifications to Application
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 5. Modifications to Application
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 5. Modifications to Application

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Wordly reserves the right to modify, suspend or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the Application or any service to which it connects, with or without notice and without liability to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Wordly reserves the right to modify, suspend or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the Application or any service to which it connects, with or without notice and without liability to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Wordly reserves the right to modify, suspend or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the Application or any service to which it connects, with or without notice and without liability to you.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 6. Updates to Application
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 6. Updates to Application
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 6. Updates to Application

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Wordly may from time to time provide enhancements or improvements to the features/functionality of the Application, which may include patches, bug fixes, updates, upgrades and other modifications ("Updates").
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Wordly may from time to time provide enhancements or improvements to the features/functionality of the Application, which may include patches, bug fixes, updates, upgrades and other modifications ("Updates").
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Wordly may from time to time provide enhancements or improvements to the features/functionality of the Application, which may include patches, bug fixes, updates, upgrades and other modifications ("Updates").

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Updates may modify or delete certain features and/or functionalities of the Application. You agree that Wordly has no obligation to (i) provide any Updates, or (ii) continue to provide or enable any particular features and/or functionalities of the Application to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Updates may modify or delete certain features and/or functionalities of the Application. You agree that Wordly has no obligation to (i) provide any Updates, or (ii) continue to provide or enable any particular features and/or functionalities of the Application to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Updates may modify or delete certain features and/or functionalities of the Application. You agree that Wordly has no obligation to (i) provide any Updates, or (ii) continue to provide or enable any particular features and/or functionalities of the Application to you.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: You further agree that all Updates will be (i) deemed to constitute an integral part of the Application, and (ii) subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: You further agree that all Updates will be (i) deemed to constitute an integral part of the Application, and (ii) subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: You further agree that all Updates will be (i) deemed to constitute an integral part of the Application, and (ii) subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 7. Third-Party Services
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 7. Third-Party Services
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 7. Third-Party Services

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: The Application may display, include or make available third-party content (including data, information, applications and other products services) or provide links to third-party websites or services ("Third-Party Services").
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: The Application may display, include or make available third-party content (including data, information, applications and other products services) or provide links to third-party websites or services ("Third-Party Services").
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: The Application may display, include or make available third-party content (including data, information, applications and other products services) or provide links to third-party websites or services ("Third-Party Services").

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: You acknowledge and agree that Wordly shall not be responsible for any Third-Party Services, including their accuracy, completeness, timeliness, validity, copyright compliance, legality, decency, quality or any other aspect thereof. Wordly does not assume and shall not have any liability or responsibility to you or any other person or entity for any Third-Party Services.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: You acknowledge and agree that Wordly shall not be responsible for any Third-Party Services, including their accuracy, completeness, timeliness, validity, copyright compliance, legality, decency, quality or any other aspect thereof. Wordly does not assume and shall not have any liability or responsibility to you or any other person or entity for any Third-Party Services.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: You acknowledge and agree that Wordly shall not be responsible for any Third-Party Services, including their accuracy, completeness, timeliness, validity, copyright compliance, legality, decency, quality or any other aspect thereof. Wordly does not assume and shall not have any liability or responsibility to you or any other person or entity for any Third-Party Services.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Third-Party Services and links thereto are provided solely as a convenience to you and you access and use them entirely at your own risk and subject to such third parties' terms and conditions.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Third-Party Services and links thereto are provided solely as a convenience to you and you access and use them entirely at your own risk and subject to such third parties' terms and conditions.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Third-Party Services and links thereto are provided solely as a convenience to you and you access and use them entirely at your own risk and subject to such third parties' terms and conditions.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 8. Privacy Policy
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 8. Privacy Policy
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 8. Privacy Policy

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Wordly collects, stores, maintains, and shares information about you in accordance with its Privacy Policy, which is available at www.wordly.ai/privacy-policy. By accepting this Agreement, you acknowledge that you hereby agree and consent to the terms and conditions of our Privacy Policy.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Wordly collects, stores, maintains, and shares information about you in accordance with its Privacy Policy, which is available at www.wordly.ai/privacy-policy. By accepting this Agreement, you acknowledge that you hereby agree and consent to the terms and conditions of our Privacy Policy.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Wordly collects, stores, maintains, and shares information about you in accordance with its Privacy Policy, which is available at www.wordly.ai/privacy-policy. By accepting this Agreement, you acknowledge that you hereby agree and consent to the terms and conditions of our Privacy Policy.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 9. Terms and Termination
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 9. Terms and Termination
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 9. Terms and Termination

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: This Agreement shall remain in effect until terminated by you or Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: This Agreement shall remain in effect until terminated by you or Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: This Agreement shall remain in effect until terminated by you or Wordly.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Wordly may, in its sole discretion, at any time and for any or no reason, suspend or terminate this Agreement with or without prior notice.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Wordly may, in its sole discretion, at any time and for any or no reason, suspend or terminate this Agreement with or without prior notice.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Wordly may, in its sole discretion, at any time and for any or no reason, suspend or terminate this Agreement with or without prior notice.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: This Agreement will terminate immediately, without prior notice from Wordly, in the event that you fail to comply with any provision of this Agreement. You may also terminate this Agreement by deleting the Application and all copies thereof from your mobile device or from your computer.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: This Agreement will terminate immediately, without prior notice from Wordly, in the event that you fail to comply with any provision of this Agreement. You may also terminate this Agreement by deleting the Application and all copies thereof from your mobile device or from your computer.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: This Agreement will terminate immediately, without prior notice from Wordly, in the event that you fail to comply with any provision of this Agreement. You may also terminate this Agreement by deleting the Application and all copies thereof from your mobile device or from your computer.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Upon termination of this Agreement, you shall cease all use of the Application and delete all copies of the Application from your mobile device or from your computer.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Upon termination of this Agreement, you shall cease all use of the Application and delete all copies of the Application from your mobile device or from your computer.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Upon termination of this Agreement, you shall cease all use of the Application and delete all copies of the Application from your mobile device or from your computer.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Termination of this Agreement will not limit any of Wordly’s rights or remedies at law or in equity in case of breach by you (during the term of this Agreement) of any of your obligations under the present Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Termination of this Agreement will not limit any of Wordly’s rights or remedies at law or in equity in case of breach by you (during the term of this Agreement) of any of your obligations under the present Agreement.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Termination of this Agreement will not limit any of Wordly’s rights or remedies at law or in equity in case of breach by you (during the term of this Agreement) of any of your obligations under the present Agreement.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 10. Indemnification
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 10. Indemnification
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 10. Indemnification

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: You agree to indemnify and hold Wordly and its parents, subsidiaries, affiliates, officers, employees, agents, partners and licensors (if any) harmless from any claim or demand, including reasonable attorneys' fees, due to or arising out of your: (a) use of the Application; (b) violation of this Agreement or any law or regulation; or (c) violation of any right of a third party.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: You agree to indemnify and hold Wordly and its parents, subsidiaries, affiliates, officers, employees, agents, partners and licensors (if any) harmless from any claim or demand, including reasonable attorneys' fees, due to or arising out of your: (a) use of the Application; (b) violation of this Agreement or any law or regulation; or (c) violation of any right of a third party.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: You agree to indemnify and hold Wordly and its parents, subsidiaries, affiliates, officers, employees, agents, partners and licensors (if any) harmless from any claim or demand, including reasonable attorneys' fees, due to or arising out of your: (a) use of the Application; (b) violation of this Agreement or any law or regulation; or (c) violation of any right of a third party.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 11. No Warranties
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 11. No Warranties
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 11. No Warranties

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: The Application is provided to you "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" and with all faults and defects without warranty of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted under applicable law, Wordly, on its own behalf and on behalf of its affiliates and its and their respective licensors and service providers, expressly disclaims all warranties, whether express, implied, statutory or otherwise, with respect to the Application, including all implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title an
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: The Application is provided to you "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" and with all faults and defects without warranty of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted under applicable law, Wordly, on its own behalf and on behalf of its affiliates and its and their respective licensors and service providers, expressly disclaims all warranties, whether express, implied, statutory or otherwise, with respect to the Application, including all implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title and non-infringement, and warranties that may arise out of course of dealing, course of performance, usage or trade practice. Without limitation to the foregoing, Wordly provides no warranty or undertaking, and makes no representation of any kind that the Application will meet your requirements, achieve any intended results, be compatible or work with any other software, applications, systems or services, operate without interruption, meet any performance or reliability standards or be error free or that any errors or defects can or will be corrected.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: The Application is provided to you "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" and with all faults and defects without warranty of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted under applicable law, Wordly, on its own behalf and on behalf of its affiliates and its and their respective licensors and service providers, expressly disclaims all warranties, whether express, implied, statutory or otherwise, with respect to the Application, including all implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title and non-infringement, and warranties that may arise out of course of dealing, course of performance, usage or trade practice. Without limitation to the foregoing, Wordly provides no warranty or undertaking, and makes no representation of any kind that the Application will meet your requirements, achieve any intended results, be compatible or work with any other software, applications, systems or services, operate without interruption, meet any performance or reliability standards or be error free or that any errors or defects can or will be corrected.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Without limiting the foregoing, neither Wordly nor any Wordly’s provider makes any representation or warranty of any kind, express or implied: (i) as to the operation or availability of the Application, or the information, content, and materials or products included thereon; (ii) that the Application will be uninterrupted or error-free; (iii) as to the accuracy, reliability, or currency of any information or content provided through the Application; or (iv) that the Application, its servers, the content, or
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Without limiting the foregoing, neither Wordly nor any Wordly’s provider makes any representation or warranty of any kind, express or implied: (i) as to the operation or availability of the Application, or the information, content, and materials or products included thereon; (ii) that the Application will be uninterrupted or error-free; (iii) as to the accuracy, reliability, or currency of any information or content provided through the Application; or (iv) that the Application, its servers, the content, or e-mails sent from or on behalf of Wordly are free of viruses, scripts, trojan horses, worms, malware, timebombs or other harmful components.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Without limiting the foregoing, neither Wordly nor any Wordly’s provider makes any representation or warranty of any kind, express or implied: (i) as to the operation or availability of the Application, or the information, content, and materials or products included thereon; (ii) that the Application will be uninterrupted or error-free; (iii) as to the accuracy, reliability, or currency of any information or content provided through the Application; or (iv) that the Application, its servers, the content, or e-mails sent from or on behalf of Wordly are free of viruses, scripts, trojan horses, worms, malware, timebombs or other harmful components.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion of or limitations on implied warranties or the limitations on the applicable statutory rights of a consumer, so some or all of the above exclusions and limitations may not apply to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion of or limitations on implied warranties or the limitations on the applicable statutory rights of a consumer, so some or all of the above exclusions and limitations may not apply to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion of or limitations on implied warranties or the limitations on the applicable statutory rights of a consumer, so some or all of the above exclusions and limitations may not apply to you.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 12. Limitation of Liability
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 12. Limitation of Liability
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 12. Limitation of Liability

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Notwithstanding any damages that you might incur, the entire liability of Wordly and any of its suppliers under any provision of this Agreement and your exclusive remedy for all of the foregoing shall be limited to the amount actually paid by you for the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Notwithstanding any damages that you might incur, the entire liability of Wordly and any of its suppliers under any provision of this Agreement and your exclusive remedy for all of the foregoing shall be limited to the amount actually paid by you for the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Notwithstanding any damages that you might incur, the entire liability of Wordly and any of its suppliers under any provision of this Agreement and your exclusive remedy for all of the foregoing shall be limited to the amount actually paid by you for the Application.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall Wordly or its suppliers be liable for any special, incidental, indirect, or consequential damages whatsoever (including, but not limited to, damages for loss of profits, for loss of data or other information, for business interruption, for personal injury, for loss of privacy arising out of or in any way related to the use of or inability to use the Application, third-party software and/or third-party hardware used with the Application, or
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall Wordly or its suppliers be liable for any special, incidental, indirect, or consequential damages whatsoever (including, but not limited to, damages for loss of profits, for loss of data or other information, for business interruption, for personal injury, for loss of privacy arising out of or in any way related to the use of or inability to use the Application, third-party software and/or third-party hardware used with the Application, or otherwise in connection with any provision of this Agreement), even if Wordly or any supplier has been advised of the possibility of such damages and even if the remedy fails of its essential purpose.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall Wordly or its suppliers be liable for any special, incidental, indirect, or consequential damages whatsoever (including, but not limited to, damages for loss of profits, for loss of data or other information, for business interruption, for personal injury, for loss of privacy arising out of or in any way related to the use of or inability to use the Application, third-party software and/or third-party hardware used with the Application, or otherwise in connection with any provision of this Agreement), even if Wordly or any supplier has been advised of the possibility of such damages and even if the remedy fails of its essential purpose.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Some states/jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of incidental or consequential damages, so the above limitation or exclusion may not apply to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Some states/jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of incidental or consequential damages, so the above limitation or exclusion may not apply to you.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Some states/jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of incidental or consequential damages, so the above limitation or exclusion may not apply to you.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 13. Severability
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 13. Severability
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 13. Severability

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: If any provision of this Agreement is held to be unenforceable or invalid, such provision will be changed and interpreted to accomplish the objectives of such provision to the greatest extent possible under applicable law and the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: If any provision of this Agreement is held to be unenforceable or invalid, such provision will be changed and interpreted to accomplish the objectives of such provision to the greatest extent possible under applicable law and the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: If any provision of this Agreement is held to be unenforceable or invalid, such provision will be changed and interpreted to accomplish the objectives of such provision to the greatest extent possible under applicable law and the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 14. Waiver
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 14. Waiver
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 14. Waiver

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Except as provided herein, the failure to exercise a right or to require performance of an obligation under this Agreement shall not affect a party's ability to exercise such right or require such performance at any time thereafter nor shall be the waiver of a breach constitute waiver of any subsequent breach.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Except as provided herein, the failure to exercise a right or to require performance of an obligation under this Agreement shall not affect a party's ability to exercise such right or require such performance at any time thereafter nor shall be the waiver of a breach constitute waiver of any subsequent breach.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Except as provided herein, the failure to exercise a right or to require performance of an obligation under this Agreement shall not affect a party's ability to exercise such right or require such performance at any time thereafter nor shall be the waiver of a breach constitute waiver of any subsequent breach.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 15. For U.S. Government End Users
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 15. For U.S. Government End Users
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 15. For U.S. Government End Users

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: The Application and related documentation are "Commercial Items", as that term is defined under 48 C.F.R. §2.101, consisting of "Commercial Computer Software" and "Commercial Computer Software Documentation", as such terms are used under 48 C.F.R. §12.212 or 48 C.F.R. §227.7202, as applicable. In accordance with 48 C.F.R. §12.212 or 48 C.F.R. §227.7202-1 through 227.7202-4, as applicable, the Commercial Computer Software and Commercial Computer Software Documentation are being licensed to U.S. Government en
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: The Application and related documentation are "Commercial Items", as that term is defined under 48 C.F.R. §2.101, consisting of "Commercial Computer Software" and "Commercial Computer Software Documentation", as such terms are used under 48 C.F.R. §12.212 or 48 C.F.R. §227.7202, as applicable. In accordance with 48 C.F.R. §12.212 or 48 C.F.R. §227.7202-1 through 227.7202-4, as applicable, the Commercial Computer Software and Commercial Computer Software Documentation are being licensed to U.S. Government end users (a) only as Commercial Items and (b) with only those rights as are granted to all other end users pursuant to the terms and conditions herein.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: The Application and related documentation are "Commercial Items", as that term is defined under 48 C.F.R. §2.101, consisting of "Commercial Computer Software" and "Commercial Computer Software Documentation", as such terms are used under 48 C.F.R. §12.212 or 48 C.F.R. §227.7202, as applicable. In accordance with 48 C.F.R. §12.212 or 48 C.F.R. §227.7202-1 through 227.7202-4, as applicable, the Commercial Computer Software and Commercial Computer Software Documentation are being licensed to U.S. Government end users (a) only as Commercial Items and (b) with only those rights as are granted to all other end users pursuant to the terms and conditions herein.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 16. Export Compliance
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 16. Export Compliance
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 16. Export Compliance

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: You may not export or re-export the Application except as authorized by United States law and the laws of the jurisdiction in which the Application was obtained.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: You may not export or re-export the Application except as authorized by United States law and the laws of the jurisdiction in which the Application was obtained.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: You may not export or re-export the Application except as authorized by United States law and the laws of the jurisdiction in which the Application was obtained.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: In particular, but without limitation, the Application may not be exported or re-exported (a) into or to a nation or a resident of any U.S. embargoed countries or (b) to anyone on the U.S. Treasury Department's list of Specially Designated Nationals or the U.S. Department of Commerce Denied Person's List or Entity List.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: In particular, but without limitation, the Application may not be exported or re-exported (a) into or to a nation or a resident of any U.S. embargoed countries or (b) to anyone on the U.S. Treasury Department's list of Specially Designated Nationals or the U.S. Department of Commerce Denied Person's List or Entity List.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: In particular, but without limitation, the Application may not be exported or re-exported (a) into or to a nation or a resident of any U.S. embargoed countries or (b) to anyone on the U.S. Treasury Department's list of Specially Designated Nationals or the U.S. Department of Commerce Denied Person's List or Entity List.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: By installing or using any component of the Application, you represent and warrant that you are not located in, under control of, or a national or resident of any such country or on any such list.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: By installing or using any component of the Application, you represent and warrant that you are not located in, under control of, or a national or resident of any such country or on any such list.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: By installing or using any component of the Application, you represent and warrant that you are not located in, under control of, or a national or resident of any such country or on any such list.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 17. Amendments to this Agreement
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 17. Amendments to this Agreement
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 17. Amendments to this Agreement

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: Wordly reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to modify or replace this Agreement at any time. If a revision is material we will provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: Wordly reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to modify or replace this Agreement at any time. If a revision is material we will provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: Wordly reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to modify or replace this Agreement at any time. If a revision is material we will provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: By continuing to access or use our Application after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: By continuing to access or use our Application after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use the Application.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: By continuing to access or use our Application after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use the Application.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 18. Governing Law
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 18. Governing Law
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 18. Governing Law

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: The laws of California, United States, excluding its conflicts of law rules, shall govern this Agreement and your use of the Application. Your use of the Application may also be subject to other local, state, national, or international laws.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: The laws of California, United States, excluding its conflicts of law rules, shall govern this Agreement and your use of the Application. Your use of the Application may also be subject to other local, state, national, or international laws.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: The laws of California, United States, excluding its conflicts of law rules, shall govern this Agreement and your use of the Application. Your use of the Application may also be subject to other local, state, national, or international laws.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: This Agreement shall not be governed by the United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Good.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: This Agreement shall not be governed by the United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Good.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 19. Contact Information
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 19. Contact Information

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: If you have any questions about this Agreement, please contact us via email at contact@wordly.ai.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: If you have any questions about this Agreement, please contact us via email at contact@wordly.ai.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: 20. Entire Agreement
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: 20. Entire Agreement
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: 20. Entire Agreement

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: The Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between you and Wordly regarding your use of the Application and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous written or oral agreements between you and Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.name: The Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between you and Wordly regarding your use of the Application and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous written or oral agreements between you and Wordly.
XCUIElementTypeStaticText.label: The Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between you and Wordly regarding your use of the Application and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous written or oral agreements between you and Wordly.

XCUIElementTypeStaticText.value: You may be subject to additional terms and conditions that apply when you use or purchase other Wordly's services, which Wordly will provide to you at the time of such use or purchase.
